evals.prompt: Break down the implementation of a user authentication system. Design spec says: JWT auth with register, login, refresh, logout. Prisma User model with email, password, role. NestJS backend. Includes guards, DTOs, and tests.
evals.expected_output: Ordered TASK-NNN items with files, dependencies, verification commands, effort estimates, and commit messages

assertions.name: task_ids
assertions.description: Tasks use TASK-NNN format

assertions.name: dependencies
assertions.description: Tasks have explicit Depends On fields (e.g., model before service)

assertions.name: verify_commands
assertions.description: Each task has an executable verification command

assertions.name: effort_estimates
assertions.description: Each task has S/M/L effort estimate

assertions.name: commit_messages
assertions.description: Each task has a conventional commit message

assertions.name: files_listed
assertions.description: Each task lists specific files to create/modify

evals.prompt: Decompose a search feature into implementation tasks. Design includes: Elasticsearch index for products, NestJS search service, REST API endpoint with filters, React search page with autocomplete, and tests.
evals.expected_output: Tasks ordered: infra first, then backend, then frontend, each with verification

assertions.name: correct_order
assertions.description: Elasticsearch setup before search service, service before API, API before frontend

assertions.name: no_circular_deps
assertions.description: Dependency graph has no cycles

assertions.name: verify_commands
assertions.description: Verification commands that can actually be run (not 'manually check')

assertions.name: effort_estimates
assertions.description: S/M/L estimates per task

assertions.name: covers_all_design
assertions.description: Every design element has at least one task

evals.prompt: Break down a database migration: add soft delete to 5 existing tables (users, projects, tasks, comments, files). Each table needs a deleted_at column, existing queries need WHERE deleted_at IS NULL filters, and an admin endpoint to permanently delete.
evals.expected_output: Tasks for migration, query updates per table, admin endpoint, and tests, ordered to avoid breaking changes

assertions.name: migration_first
assertions.description: Database migration task comes before query changes

assertions.name: per_table_tasks
assertions.description: Separate tasks or grouped tasks for each table's query updates

assertions.name: backward_compatible_order
assertions.description: Migration adds nullable column before queries start filtering on it

assertions.name: admin_endpoint_task
assertions.description: Task for permanent delete admin endpoint

assertions.name: test_tasks
assertions.description: Test tasks verifying soft delete behavior and hard delete admin

evals.prompt: Decompose adding real-time notifications via WebSocket. Design: Socket.IO gateway in NestJS, notification service, PostgreSQL storage, React notification bell with dropdown, mark-as-read, and push notifications via Firebase.
evals.expected_output: Tasks covering backend gateway, service, storage, frontend UI, and Firebase integration in dependency order

assertions.name: backend_before_frontend
assertions.description: WebSocket gateway and service tasks before React UI tasks

assertions.name: storage_before_service
assertions.description: Notification model/migration before notification service

assertions.name: firebase_separate
assertions.description: Firebase push notifications as a separate task from in-app notifications

assertions.name: verify_commands
assertions.description: Each task has verification (e.g., 'npm test -- --grep Notification')

assertions.name: effort_estimates
assertions.description: S/M/L estimates reflecting WebSocket complexity as M or L

evals.prompt: Break down adding multi-language support (i18n) to a React + NestJS app with 30 screens. Need: string extraction, translation file structure, locale switching, RTL-ready CSS, and backend message localization.
evals.expected_output: Tasks covering frontend extraction, backend messages, translation infrastructure, and testing across locales

assertions.name: infrastructure_first
assertions.description: Translation file structure and i18n library setup before string extraction

assertions.name: frontend_extraction
assertions.description: Task for extracting hardcoded strings from 30 screens

assertions.name: backend_messages
assertions.description: Task for externalizing backend error messages and email templates

assertions.name: locale_switching
assertions.description: Task for locale switching UI component

assertions.name: testing_task
assertions.description: Task for testing across all supported locales
